hero.description: Junior Web Developer passionate about creating clear and functional digital experiences. Currently seeking my first professional opportunity to grow and refine my skills.

about.paragraph1: I am a Junior Web Developer with a strong focus on building impactful, user-centered web applications. With a commitment to continuous growth, I strive to create digital solutions that blend functionality with seamless user experiences.
about.paragraph2: Although I am early in my professional journey, I have dedicated significant time to mastering modern web technologies through self-directed learning and personal projects. This has allowed me to develop a solid understanding of industry best practices, as well as the technical skills required to deliver high-quality, scalable web solutions.

projectsPage.title: All projects
projectsPage.description: A collection of personal projects where I have explored various web development technologies and concepts.

footer.madeBy: Designed and coded by K4sum3i in Córdoba, Spain — thanks for scrolling.
